# dotfiles

> Cross-platform dotfiles managed by Chezmoi + Nix for macOS and Linux. Provides one-command environment bootstrap with Nix development shells (Node, Python, Rust, Go, DevOps, Haskell, Ruby, and more), Zsh + Oh My Zsh + Powerlevel10k, Tmux with Catppuccin theme, Neovim with full LSP support, Homebrew extras for macOS, and a suite of portable AI agent skills in the `skills/` directory.

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/README.md): Setup, dev environments, shell/terminal/editor config, and automation
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/AGENTS.md): File naming conventions, key directories, and commit guidelines

## API / Key Files

- [flake.nix](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/flake.nix): Nix flake with dev shells (default, node, python, rust, go, devops, haskell, ruby, scheme, perl, lua, full)
- [justfile](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/justfile): Task runner (update, status, check)
- [Brewfile](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/Brewfile): macOS Homebrew packages
- [dot_config/](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_config/): Neovim, Ghostty, Tmux, and other tool configs
- [dot_zshrc.tmpl](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_zshrc.tmpl): Zsh configuration template
- [skills/](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/skills/): Portable AI agent skills directory

## Skills

- [audit-security](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/skills/audit-security/SKILL.md): Security auditing and threat detection
- [build-cli](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/skills/build-cli/SKILL.md): CLI conventions and patterns
- [choose-stack](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/skills/choose-stack/SKILL.md): Tech stack selection
- [configure-ai](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/skills/configure-ai/SKILL.md): AI tooling configuration
- [create-llms-txt](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/skills/create-llms-txt/SKILL.md): Generate llms.txt files
- [create-oss-skill](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/skills/create-oss-skill/SKILL.md): Agent skill scaffolding and authoring
- [extend-oss-skills-to-claude](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/skills/extend-oss-skills-to-claude/SKILL.md): Adapt skills for Claude Code
- [review-design](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/skills/review-design/SKILL.md): Pragmatic design review
- [scaffold-project](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/skills/scaffold-project/SKILL.md): Project scaffolding conventions
- [setup-ci](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/skills/setup-ci/SKILL.md): CI/CD pipeline setup
- [setup-devenv](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/skills/setup-devenv/SKILL.md): Nix development shell guidance
- [setup-release](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/skills/setup-release/SKILL.md): Release pipeline setup
- [style-brand](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/skills/style-brand/SKILL.md): Terminal branding and visual standards
- [style-cli](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/skills/style-cli/SKILL.md): Terminal UI standard
- [write-code](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/skills/write-code/SKILL.md): Coding standards and practices
- [write-readme](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/skills/write-readme/SKILL.md): README standards

## Optional

- [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): How to contribute
